narrative:
Green Twp North (precinct in Brown County) has 470 registered voters — a small sample, so the figures below carry meaningful statistical uncertainty. Republican-leaning voters make up 31.3% of registrants and Democratic-leaning voters account for 10.9%, a pronounced Republican lean of 20.4 percentage points.
